data.name: Allegiant Travel Company
data.description: Allegiant Travel Company, a leisure travel company, provides travel and leisure services and products to residents of under-served cities in the United States. The company offers scheduled air transportation on limited-frequency, nonstop flights between underserved cities and leisure destinations. data.name: Aura Biosciences, Inc.
data.description: Aura Biosciences, Inc., a clinical-stage biotechnology company, develops precision therapies to treat solid tumors.
